title: Old Nerv Logo in Q
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Old Nerv Logo in Q             Quote Post by evill33t » Thu Apr 25, 2013 1:15 pm When Kaworu shows Shinji what's left of the Geofront you can spot the Nerv logo from NGE on a wall. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Apr 25, 2013 1:17 pm That logo has been used in 1.0 and 2.0 alongside the apple redesign. It's not exclusive to TV/EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Apr 25, 2013 1:19 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: That logo has been used in 1.0 and 2.0 alongside the apple redesign. It's not exclusive to TV/EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by evill33t » Thu Apr 25, 2013 1:21 pm Dang, guess its time to re-watch 1.11 and 2.22.

[]:             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Thu Apr 25, 2013 1:49 pm Yeah, the old Nerv logo has appeared in all three Rebuild films, except with one small difference: the letter "V" in "NERV" is now more slanted/stylized than how it looked in the original TV series.

[]:             Quote Post by atarashiieva » Thu Apr 25, 2013 1:55 pm In NME, the old NERV logo is only used inside the Geofront. The redesigned logo was used to represent a different branding for the exterior world.

[]:             Quote Post by Charsi » Thu Apr 25, 2013 2:01 pm I remember pausing and looking at this in 3.33. The writing reads, medical division of the 3rd tokyo base - or something. edit: loaded it up AREA 00538 3RD SHIN-TOKYO BASE Japan Q666 MEDICAL DEPARTMENT

[]:             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Thu Apr 25, 2013 2:16 pm It also has a gratuitous 666 in there.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Apr 25, 2013 3:02 pm atarashiieva wrote: In NME, the old NERV logo is only used inside the Geofront. The redesigned logo was used to represent a different branding for the exterior world.
